headline: Camp Dream GA is a volunteer-powered camp community built around access, joy, and belonging
subheadline: The public story of Camp Dream GA starts with a simple mission: children and young adults with disabilities deserve a traditional camp experience shaped around dignity, friendship, recreation, and support.

sections.title: A traditional camp experience
sections.description: Camp Dream GA is not only a care environment. It is a camp community with shared meals, cabin life, recreation, music, worship, and celebration.

sections.title: A barrier-free approach
sections.description: Programs are shaped for children and young adults with disabilities so participation and belonging are not treated as extras.

sections.title: A strong volunteer culture
sections.description: Volunteers are central to the camp model, making support feel relational and personal instead of distant or transactional.

cta.heading: Learn what Camp Dream GA does, where camp is held, and how you can step into the mission.
cta.body: The clearest next steps are to read about the programs, visit the volunteer page, or support camp financially.
